testcase.name: test_login_without_2fa_success
testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_2fa_login_flow.py:59: in test_login_without_2fa_success assert response.status_code == 200, f"Expected 200, got {response.status_code}" E AssertionError: Expected 200, got 401 E assert 401 == 200 E + where 401 = <Response [401]>.status_code

testcase.name: test_non_2fa_user_on_2fa_endpoint

failure.message: AssertionError: Should return 400 for user without 2FA assert 401 == 400 + where 401 = <Response [401]>.status_code

testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_2fa_login_flow.py:214: in test_non_2fa_user_on_2fa_endpoint assert response.status_code == 400, "Should return 400 for user without 2FA" E AssertionError: Should return 400 for user without 2FA E assert 401 == 400 E + where 401 = <Response [401]>.status_code
